sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27183" key="diomalu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διομᾰλ-ύνω</orth>, <sense id="n27183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">distribute evenly,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.130d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
